data.title: Satoshi Ramp mainnet supports cross-chain transfer of BTC to NEAR network
AscendEX will list Hosky Token (HOSKY)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch Hosky Token (HOSKY) at 23:00 on February 19, opening the HOSKY/USDT trading pair, and is now open for recharge.
AscendEX (formerly BitMax) is the first and most comprehensive trading platform for Memecoin on the entire network. The Meme Research Institute team under the platform selects high-quality Memes for listing based on on-chain data and project background. The platform's Memecoin first launch rate is as high as 80%.

data.title: Trump shares an XRP-related article on Truth Social
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Trump shared an XRP-related article on Truth Social on Tuesday. The article was published by CoinDesk in January, revealing how Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse made progress in transactions and recruitment in the United States after Trump won the election in November. Although XRP's trading volume rose 26% to $5.5 billion in the past 24 hours after the article was published, the price of XRP tokens remained at a low of $2.53. (Coindesk)

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETF Sees Significant Inflow In The U.S.
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 19, Farside Investors reported a net inflow of $4.6 million into the U.S. Ethereum spot ETF the previous day.

data.title: Bitcoin Spot ETF Sees Significant Outflow
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 19, monitoring by Farside Investors revealed that the U.S. Bitcoin spot ETF experienced a net outflow of $60.7 million the previous day.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETF had a total net outflow of US$60.635 million yesterday, and the ETF net asset ratio reached 5.89%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (February 18, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was 60.635 million US dollars. Yesterday, Grayscale ETF GBTC had a daily net outflow of 0.00 US dollars, and the current historical net outflow of GBTC is 22.013 billion US dollars. Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF BTC had a daily net outflow of 0.00 US dollars, and the current historical total net inflow of Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust BTC is 1.26 billion US dollars. The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest daily net inflow yesterday was BlackRock ETF IBIT, with a daily net inflow of 68.4413 million US dollars, and the current historical total net inflow of IBIT reached 40.969 billion US dollars. As of press time, the total net asset value of the Bitcoin spot ETF is US$110.071 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) is 5.89%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$40.054 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net inflow of $4.6023 million yesterday, and the ETF net asset ratio reached 3.14%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (February 18, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was 4.6023 million US dollars. Yesterday, Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF ETHE had a single-day net outflow of 0.00 US dollars, and the current historical net outflow of ETHE is 3.982 billion US dollars. Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH had a single-day net outflow of 0.00 US dollars, and the current historical total net inflow of Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETH is 612 million US dollars. The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow yesterday was Fidelity ETF FETH, with a single-day net inflow of 4.6023 million US dollars, and the current historical total net inflow of FETH has reached 1.52 billion US dollars. 
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF is US$9.95 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 3.14%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$3.157 billion.

data.title: Metaplanet Announces 10-for-1 Stock Split to Enhance Market Liquidity
data.description: According to Odaily, Japanese publicly traded company Metaplanet has announced a 10-for-1 stock split, effective April 1, 2025. This decision aims to reduce the trading cost per share and increase market liquidity. The move follows a significant rise in Metaplanet's stock price, which had raised the minimum investment cost for retail investors. The stock split will apply to shareholders registered by March 31, converting each existing share into ten new shares. This will increase the total number of issued shares from approximately 39.1 million to 391.6 million. The company stated that this initiative is intended to lower the unit price for investors, thereby enhancing market participation.

data.title: Wintermute CEO Predicts Growth In Asset Tokenization Market
data.description: According to Foresight News, at the Consensus Hong Kong 2025 conference, Wintermute CEO Evgeny Gaevoy discussed the evolving landscape of cryptocurrency adoption in the United States. Gaevoy noted that as the U.S. gradually embraces cryptocurrencies, the risk-averse attitude of traditional institutions is likely to diminish. He projected that the asset tokenization market could reach a scale of hundreds of billions to trillions of dollars, with assets being used as collateral or margin. Gaevoy also highlighted that increased participation in the market would enhance liquidity depth. Additionally, he expressed hope that regulatory developments in the crypto sector would drive changes in market pricing.

data.title: Wintermute founder: BTC and ETH will continue to rise, but there may not be a full bull market. The market will focus on protocols with sustainable economic models
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Wintermute founder and CEO Evgeny Gaevoy said today in Consensus Hong Kong 2025 that for Bitcoin, market liquidity may have returned to the level before the FTX crash, but for other tokens, liquidity is still insufficient. The market is still dominated by the price of Bitcoin, and the liquidity of other tokens is affected. In addition, the launch of new tokens will extract liquidity from existing tokens. For example, when TRUMP was launched, a large amount of funds flowed out of other tokens, causing the market to fall sharply. This phenomenon occurs every time a new token is launched.
Evgeny Gaevoy also said that the market has not fully priced in the improvement of the regulatory environment, and despite many positive regulatory developments, the market is still in a wait-and-see state.
Evgeny Gaevoy finally said that he believes that the prices of Bitcoin and Ethereum will continue to rise, and although there may not be a full bull market, there will be some fluctuations in the market. Investors will pay more attention to those protocols that really have practical uses and sustainable economic models.
